 for our Secure Connect offering. We are passionate about structure and order, love communication, and continuously work on developing our services for our customers. Are you ready for your next opportunity and want to grow together with us?
   

  

 My name is Jelena Lazarevic, and I am responsible for the Project Management Team at Telia Cygate Region East. Our focus is on follow-up and development of our services for our customers. In this role, you will take on a crucial responsibility in ensuring our customers are satisfied with our delivery.
   

  

 Do you want to be part of a customer-focused team where, together with your colleagues, you take strong ownership of developing our offering for the real estate industry? Then take the opportunity to join us! We are looking for a Service Delivery Manager with a strong business mindset and high personal drive.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As a Service Delivery Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, development, and optimization of the entire customer solution throughout the contract period. You will maintain continuous dialogue with customers, conduct customer meetings with follow-ups on delivered services, and contribute to the development of our business. You will work proactively to support positive development and growth within our customer engagements.
   

  

 In this role, you will have operational responsibility for several customers. You will be part of a team of specialists working with our real estate customers, where you jointly develop strategies on how to grow our business and offering, as well as how to best support the customer’s operations using Telia’s business services. Your specific responsibility is to ensure that Telia Cygate meets the customer’s expectations according to the agreement.
   

  

**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You are a proactive and business-driven person who enjoys working closely with customers and taking real ownership of your delivery. You build trust naturally through clear communication, reliability, and a genuine interest in understanding the customer’s needs. You feel comfortable navigating complex environments where both technology and relationships play an important role.
   

  

 You are structured and solution-oriented, with the ability to balance day-to-day operational work while also spotting opportunities for improvement and growth. You don’t wait for things to happen - you take initiative, drive conversations forward, and contribute to creating long-term value both for the customer and the business.
   

  

* Proven experience in Service Delivery Management within IT or telecom
* Solid understanding of IT service management frameworks such as ITIL and how they are applied in practice
* Strong ability to manage multiple stakeholders and build long-term, trust-based relationships
* Experience driving customer dialogue, service follow-ups, and continuous improvement initiatives
* Experience working with customers in the real estate industry is a strong advantage
* Native or near-native fluency in Swedish is required, along with strong English skills


**Why Telia Cygate?**
 At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.
   

  

 Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.
   

  

 Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!
   

  

**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**
 With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Interested? Apply!**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-06-28.** 
 Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 Location:
 **Solna**
 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner.**
 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Jelena Lazarevic at jelena.lazarevic@cygate.se.
   

  

 We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Sales Executive
description:
You’re a hunter. You're not a salesperson who just waits for leads to land on their desk. You like finding the angle, opening the door, digging into the problem, and turning a cold conversation into real revenue. You’ve sold AI before, so you know the difference between hype and tech that actually solves something.
 



  





 That’s the bit that matters here. This is agentic AI with a strong reputation in the enterprise tech space, not another shiny product looking for a problem. You’ll have ownership of your approach, control of the sales cycle, and the freedom to build pipeline in a way that works.
 



  





 For someone relentless about new business, this is a proper growth role. New locations, double OTE, clear progression, and a culture that moves quickly. If you want innovative AI tech, real earning potential, and a role where your wins actually shape what comes next, this is worth a serious look.
 



  





**Who’s it for and what’s in it for you?** 




  





 AI that helps people spend less time chasing info and more time solving problems? Sounds great, right? Well that's exactly what our client is creating. By connecting data, systems, and workflows, they help organisations to automate repetitive work, uncover actionable insights, and get things done faster. They're backed by one of the world's largest enterprise software companies too, so are making waves in the industry.
 



  





 It's a great place for someone who wants to work with the latest tech, whilst having a serious impact on how work gets done in businesses each and every day. And with a culture that's designed around growth, you'll get ownership, autonomy, and support on your ideas from day one.
 



  





**What will your day to day look like?** 




  





 This is a new-logo focused, hunter sales role where you’ll work with a portfolio of AI tech, selling it into complex enterprise environments. An average week might include:
 



  




* Supporting the regional sales team with executing the GTM strategy
* Finding and pursuing new business opportunities
* Following up on prospects identified through campaigning
* Having consultative, value-focused conversations with customers
* Identifying, qualifying, and closing 6-7 digit ACV opportunities
* Partnering with other teams in the business to drive new sales



  





 Success in this role looks like delivering on your ARR targets.
 



  





**This role will suit you if you…** 




  




* Would describe yourself as a true sales ‘hunter’
* Thrive off identifying, pursuing, and closing new business
* Have previously sold AI solutions (ideally agentic systems)
* Understand how AI works in enterprise environments
* Love conducting a consultative, value-based sell
* Know how to speak the language of technical and C-suite stakeholders



  





 Ideally you’d have also sold into industrial markets (manufacturing, energy, aerospace & defense, engineering, construction) but this isn’t a deal breaker for this role.
 



  





**Think this could be your next role?** 




 Then we’d love to hear from you! If you’re interested in applying or would like to see the full job description for this role, please get in touch with Alex on alex.baker@fmctalent.com
 



  





**The fine print** 




 Reference number: 22399
 



 Temporary or Permanent: Permanent

title: Sales Manager, Retail
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

 At Wolt, you can grow your sales career with a fun and fast-scaling global business. Part of the DoorDash team, we’re building a global logistics platform that can deliver (almost) everything in your city, to your door in minutes. Today, our products are used by 55+ million registered users who can now order from 200,000+ restaurants and retail stores across 30+ countries around the world.
   

  

 Our Sales teams create and build our relationships with merchants. Together, we’ve helped big brands, local stores and neighborhood restaurants do over €15 billion’s worth of business through our platform. We’re constantly launching new cities and products, so there are always new opportunities to expand your skills and progress your career.
   

  

 What you’ll be doing
   

  

 As Sales Manager, you’ll be responsible for identifying, negotiating, and closing partnerships with retailers. You’ll build strong pipelines, manage relationships, and collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure long-term partner success.
   

  

**Day-to-day in this role you’ll:**
* Explore and prospect the market to uncover untapped opportunities
* Identify potential partnerships and initiate engagement with restaurants and retailers aligned with Wolt’s vision
* Manage your pipeline of prospects systematically and ensure consistent progress
* Assess venue performance to set profitable business terms and negotiate agreements
* Collaborate closely with internal departments, ensuring clear and effective communication


 Our humble expectations
   

  

 You’ll do well at Wolt if you:
   

  

* 3-5 years of experience in retail sales, account management, field operations, or sales support
* Have excellent analytical skills to support data-driven sales decisions.
* Have the charm, empathy and honesty to build strong relationships.
* Are used to high-performance, high-expectation cultures.
* Have a proven track record of making sales and closing deals.
* High ownership mentality with ambition to go beyond the obvious
* Are entrepreneurial, innovative, and good at solving problems.
* Can adapt quickly in a rapidly changing market.
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 What we offer
   

  

 You'll join a team that delivers real value across the organization. Our mission is to make Wolt's retail business even stronger, and the impact you make here will be recognized all the way to the top.
   

  

 You'll work closely with your team and team lead in an environment designed to help your potential thrive. We don't just want you to reach your goals, we want to redefine what "great" looks like.
   

  

 Our spacious office sits in a vibrant, growing part of Stockholm, with a gym just across the street and plenty of restaurants nearby. The Swedish team takes genuine pride in well-being and a strong, people-first culture. Gatherings, afterworks, and celebrations are a regular part of life here.
   

  

 Why you’ll love it
   

  

* 🚀Global and growing fast: Be part of a fast-moving scaleup
* 🤩Ride of a lifetime: Accelerate your career and build your sales skills
* 💪Instant impact: Take ownership and make a difference
* 💙Big hearts and small egos: Surround yourself with smart, friendly people


 Next steps
   

  

 If you are excited about working in a high-growth environment, taking ownership, and being part of an extremely ambitious team, then click below to apply, make sure to add your CV and get the conversation going!
   

  

 We will be reviewing applications on an on-going basis. If this sounds like an opportunity you want to pursue, apply today! 💙
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Head of M&A & Corporate Development
description:
**About The Company**
 Our Client is an AI-native recruitment platform transforming how companies hire top talent. By combining proprietary AI infrastructure with a network of expert talent partners, they deliver dramatically faster and better hiring outcomes than traditional agencies.
   

  

 Their platform reaches over 13,000 candidates weekly and leverages a proprietary database of nearly one billion candidate profiles to help ambitious startups and scaleups build world-class teams.
   

  

 Their results speak for themselves:
   

  

* 3–4x faster hiring compared to industry averages
* 5–10x higher fill rates than traditional agencies
* 6x revenue growth last year while maintaining strong profitability


 Backed by leading investors including Notion Capital, Frontline Ventures, and prominent operators from Workday, eBay, Monzo, HubSpot, McKinsey, and Hg Capital, they're entering next phase of growth.
   

  

* Location: United Kingdom (Remote)
* Employment Type: Full-time
* Seniority Level: Senior Level
* Work Authorization: Valid Work-Permit for UK


 The Opportunity
   

  

 As Head of M&A & Corporate Development, you will architect and execute the strategy from the ground up.
   

  

 This is not a role for someone who wants institutional infrastructure. We are looking for an entrepreneurial operator who knows how to source deals, structure financing, navigate complexity, and close transactions with limited resources.
   

  

 For the right candidate, this role offers a clear path to becoming the company's
 **future CFO** 
 .
   

  

**What You'll Do**
***Deal Origination & Pipeline Development;***
* Build and manage a proprietary acquisition pipeline across Europe
* Conduct owner outreach and relationship building with SME targets
* Develop long-term relationships with founders and business owners
* Identify high-potential acquisition opportunities


***M&A Execution;***
* Lead transactions from origination through closing
* Structure LOIs, negotiate commercial terms, and manage exclusivity
* Coordinate legal, financial, and operational due diligence
* Manage advisors, data rooms, and transaction workstreams


***Financing & Structuring;***
* Work directly with lenders and financing partners
* Structure debt, mezzanine, vendor financing, and earnout packages
* Support capital raising activities where needed
* Optimize transaction economics and risk allocation


***Integration & Portfolio Growth;***
* Support post-acquisition integration efforts
* Help acquired businesses leverage company's AI infrastructure
* Establish scalable playbooks for future acquisitions
* Drive portfolio value creation initiatives


**Who We're Looking For**
 We're seeking an entrepreneurial M&A leader with a proven ability to execute transactions in resource-constrained environments.
   

  

***You likely bring:***
* End-to-end SME M&A execution experience
* Deal origination and owner outreach expertise
* Hands-on experience with acquisition financing
* Strong legal and financial due diligence capabilities
* The ability to operate independently without large institutional support


*****Particularly attractive backgrounds include:*****
* Corporate Development or M&A in high-growth companies
* Entrepreneurship or founder experience
* Professional services or recruitment industry M&A
* Roll-up or buy-and-build strategies
* Private equity or lower middle-market transactions


**Nice to Have**
* Earnout structuring experience
* Professional services M&A background
* Experience scaling acquisition engines
* Exposure to AI or technology-enabled services businesses
* Track record progressing toward CFO or finance leadership roles


**What We Offer**
* Competitive base salary
* Significant equity participation designed for meaningful ownership
* Remote-first work model
* Direct access to founders and investors
* Opportunity to build a category-defining company from the ground up
* Explicit fast track to CFO as the platform scales


***Join us at the exact moment we transition from proving the model to scaling it and help build the defining AI-powered roll-up in the global recruitment industry...***

title: Javautvecklare
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.
   

  

**Din profil (Skall krav)**
* Minst 9 års erfarenhet av Javautveckling
* Högskole-/universitetsutbildning med IT-inriktning motsvarande systemvetare eller civilingenjör
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av Angular och typescript
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av REST-API
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av Spring Boot
* kunna kommunicera på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Minst 1 års erfarenhet av av Oracle SQL
* Minst 1 års erfarenhet av OpenShift
* Minst 1 års erfarenhet av GitOps
* Erfarenhet av ett eller flera av följande verktyg Tekton, ArgocCD och Kibana/Elastic
* Erfarenhet av incidenthantering
* Utvecklat eller underhållit system för bevarande av allmänna handlingar


**Sista ansökningdatum:** 
 17-06-2026
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Sharepoint Architect
description:
SharePoint Architect
 



 Location: Stockholm, Sweden
 



 Contract Duration
 **:** 
 6–12 Months (Potential Extension)
 



  





  





 About the Role:
 



  





 We are looking for a skilled SharePoint Architect to lead the design and implementation of modern Microsoft 365 intranet solutions. This role requires a strong understanding of SharePoint Online, information architecture, and creating intuitive digital workplace experiences.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Architect and design modern intranet solutions using SharePoint Online and Microsoft 365.
* Develop engaging and user-friendly intranet portals leveraging Communication Sites, Hub Sites, and Modern Pages.
* Define content organization, site structure, navigation, and information architecture.
* Work closely with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into effective solutions.
* Configure and optimize SharePoint web parts, layouts, and page designs.
* Apply UI/UX best practices to enhance user engagement and adoption.



  





 Required Experience & Skills
 


* Proven experience designing and delivering SharePoint Online solutions.
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft 365 and modern SharePoint capabilities.
* Hands-on experience with: Communication Sites, Hub Sites, Modern Site Pages, SharePoint Web Parts
* Solid understanding of information architecture and content governance.
* Familiarity with UI/UX principles for intranet and collaboration platforms.
* Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS for minor styling and customization.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.



  





 If this is of interest, please apply

title: Internship- Sales or Solution Engineering Paths-Stockholm
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
**About Futureforce University Recruiting**
 Our Futureforce University Recruiting program is dedicated to attracting, retaining and cultivating talent. Our interns and new graduates work on real projects that affect how our business runs, giving them the opportunity to make a tangible impact on the future of our company. With offices all over the world, our recruits have the chance to collaborate and connect with fellow employees on a global scale. We offer job shadowing, mentorship programs, talent development courses, and much more.
   

  

**Job Category**
 Fixed Term & Temporary
   

  

**Job Details**
**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**Location: Stockholm**
**Schedule: Part-time (10-15 hours/week)**
**Start Date: September**
**Duration:10 Months**
**Hybrid 4 days in the office one from home.**
 Your Journey Starts Here. At Salesforce, we believe that your final year of university should be about more than just exams,it should be about launching your career. We are looking for the next generation of
 **Swedish** 
**-speaking Trailblazers** 
 to join our
 **Stockholm** 
 Ohana office for a unique internship.
   

  

 By applying to this
 **Futureforce Talent Hub** 
 , you are putting yourself on our radar for two distinct career paths:
 **Solutions Engineering and Sales.** 
 We believe your potential shouldn't be boxed into a single job title. By applying to this Hub, you're giving us the green light to personally review your CV and map your unique strengths to the team where you’ll have the most impact, whether that's in Solutions Engineering or Sales.
   

  

**The Two Paths Within The Hub**
* Solutions Engineering (The Technical Consultant) The Mission: You are the bridge between "business problems" and "technical solutions," acting as a trusted advisor to help customers understand the power of the Salesforce platform. What You’ll Do: You’ll dig deep into how a company operates, identify their pain points, and then configure tailored product demonstrations that show them a better way to work. Your Impact: You’ll become a master of the "discovery" process, learning to ask the right questions and translating technical features into real-world business value for organizations. Ideal for: Students with a "tinkerer" mindset who enjoy explaining complex ideas simply, love a good challenge, and want to blend their technical curiosity with a client-facing career. Background:We consider applicants from the following academic backgrounds: Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science/Data Engineering, Information Systems, or other adjacent disciplines
* Sales & Business Development (The Growth Driver) The Mission: You are the front line of Salesforce, identifying new opportunities and building the foundational relationships that fuel our growth. What You’ll Do: You’ll learn to navigate the Swedish market, researching key industries and engaging with stakeholders to understand their digital needs. Your Impact: You’ll master the "Art of the Deal," learning world-class sales methodologies while helping local businesses become more customer-centric. Ideal for: High-energy, resilient communicators who are driven by goals and love the thrill of opening new doors. Background: We welcome all academic backgrounds! Whether you study Business, Tech, Humanities, or Science, we value your unique perspective.


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

********Posting Statement********
 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: SAP Solution Architect
description:
**\*\*\* SAP Solution Architect (Supply Chain Planning - IBP & PPDS) - 12+ months - Hybrid - Sweden \*\*\*** 




  





 RED now has a new contract opportunity for a SAP Solution Architect (Supply Chain Planning E2E) to join one of our key partners for a large-scale global SAP transformation programme.
 



  





 The initial contract will be for 12+ months, with scope for extension across the full programme duration through 2027 and beyond.
 



  





 This contract is to start August 2026 and will be hybrid, with 3 days per week on-site in Sweden (up to 4 during peak phases).
 



  





  





**Specific skills/experience required:** 



* 5+ years’ experience as a Solution Architect
* 10+ years of overall IT / SAP experience
* Strong experience within Supply Chain Planning (strategic, tactical, operational)
* Proven experience delivering large ERP transformation programmes
* Hands-on SAP experience across IBP, PPDS, and PP/QM
* Strong ability to translate business requirements into solution architecture
* Experience defining and maintaining target and current architecture documentation
* Ability to manage architectural decisions, deviations, and roadmap planning
* Strong stakeholder management skills across business, IT, and programme teams
* Excellent analytical and communication skills (English required)
* Able to join by August 2026



  





  





**\*\*\*Candidate must be based in Europe and willing to travel as required.\*\*\*** 




  





  





 If this role interests you, please send your CV to Lara on logul@redglobal.com or apply here!

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Vi söker en Engineering Manager som vill ta helhetsansvar för arkitektur, integrationer och AI-driven automatisering i ett bolag med tydligt syfte och högt tempo. Du arbetar nära verksamheten och ledningen, driver tekniska vägval och ser resultatet av ditt arbete i vardagen. Du kommer tillhöra ett växande bolag inom koncernen KEYTO Group.
 



  





 Det här är en roll för dig som trivs i ett fokuserat bolag med korta beslutsvägar, där du har ett genuint tekniskt ägarskap. Du tar ansvar för hela tech-leveransen, driver AI-lösningar mot affärssystem och leder ett team med en utvecklare framåt — allt inom ett bolag där teknik gör verklig skillnad i den dagliga verksamheten.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Du tar en central roll där du formar bolagets tekniska riktning från grunden. Vår kärna bygger på Podio som CRM-system och ett ekosystem av integrationer mot fakturerings-, bokförings-, löne- och kommunikationssystem - samtidigt driver vi en växande satsning på AI och automatisering. Du tar fullt ägarskap för den tekniska leveransen, från arkitektur till produktion och du är den som håller ihop helheten.
 



  





 I denna roll kommer 70-75 % av din tid vara praktisk där du kodar, bygger integrationer, granskar kod och skapar arkitekturen bakom våra lösningar. Resterande 30–40 % är planering, teknisk strategi och ledning av en utvecklare. Du jobbar tätt med ledningen och kommer även ha dialog med koncernens övriga IT-organisation i strategiska techfrågor.
 



  





 Konkret innebär det att du:
 


* Äger och arbetar operativt i hela tech-leveransen: arkitektur, integrationer, automatisering och AI från idé till produktion



  




* Driver och levererar skräddarsydda AI-lösningar mot våra affärssystem



  




* Tar personalansvar för och leder teamet bestående av en utvecklare



  




* Tar fram och underhåller en teknisk utvecklingsplan i samråd med ledningsgruppen



  




* Ansvarar för säkerhet, drift, behörigheter och datalager på systemnivå



  




* Kartlägger och dokumenterar systemlandskapet — hur allt hänger ihop, var data flödar och varför



  




* Kvalitetssäkrar genom kodgranskning, arkitekturprinciper och etablerade arbetssätt



  




* Identifierar var teknik gör störst affärsnytta och löser de problemen



  




* Säkerställer hög kvalitet i tekniska lösningar och leveranser



  





 Vårt kontor ligger i centrala Stockholm och du rapporterar direkt till VD.
 



  





**Din bakgrund** 




 Vi tror att du har 3–5 års erfarenhet som utvecklare, alternativt en bakgrund som konsult som nu vill in-house och äga något långsiktigt. Vi vill att du är självgående, har sett mer än ett system och kan ta tekniskt ledarskap från dag ett.
 



  





 Vi ser gärna att du har:
 


* Vana att bygga och underhålla API-integrationer mellan olika SaaS-system



  




* Erfarenhet av att äga en molnmiljö (AWS, Azure, GCP eller liknande) — inte bara hantera kod utan ta ansvar för infrastruktur, säkerhet och drift



  




* God förståelse för datamodellering och databaser



  




* Praktisk erfarenhet av moderna AI-verktyg i utvecklingen eller ett genuint driv att lära dig på riktigt



  




* Stark systemarkitekturskompetens - kan tänka i moduler, gränssnitt och skalbarhet



  




* Erfarenhet av affärssystemvärlden (CRM, ekonomisystem, lön, telefoni) eller vana att snabbt sätta dig in i sådana miljöer



  




* Förmåga att kommunicera och dokumentera på svenska



  





 Meriterande:
 


* Erfarenhet av Podio, GlobiFlow/Procfu, eller liknande lågkodsplattformar som kärnsystem.



  




* Tidigare jobbat med bemannings-, HR-, ekonomi- eller CRM-system (t.ex. Fortnox, Visma, Quinyx, HubSpot).



  




* Erfarenhet av att utvärdera och migrera kärnsystem.



  




* Hands-on med LLMer som Claude, Claude Code, MCP-servrar eller motsvarande AI-utvecklingsverktyg.



  




* Tidigare ledar-, mentorroll eller motsvarande ansvar för en utvecklares dagliga arbete.



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som genuint brinner för att lösa vardagliga problem med teknik och se affärsvärdet av det du bygger. Du söker förståelse innan du söker lösningar och du ser tydligt kopplingen mellan det du bygger och det värde det skapar för affären. Du har en naturlig förmåga att kommunicera med människor oavsett teknisk bakgrund samt kan stötta och leda en utvecklare i det dagliga arbetet. Du tycker det är roligt att leverera saker som faktiskt används, inte att bygga eleganta system som ingen rör. Du vill vara nära besluten, nära verksamheten och se resultatet av ditt arbete i verksamheten varje vecka.
 



  





**Om oss** 




 Veterankraft är en del av koncernen KEYTO Group och en av Sveriges ledande aktörer för seniorer som vill jobba. Vi förmedlar bemanning och hushållsnära tjänster med ett tydligt syfte: ge erfarna människor meningsfulla uppdrag och våra kunder pålitlig hjälp. Vi är ett växande bolag med ambitiösa mål, korta beslutsvägar och en kultur där det görs mer än det pratas.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 Tjänsten är en heltidstjänst med tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Vi tillämpar provanställning och hanterar ansökningar löpande. Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt!
 



  





 Har du några frågor angående tjänsten eller vår rekryteringsprocess är du varmt välkommen att kontakta oss på hr@veterankraft.se.

title: Technical Project Manager, Data Driven Care – Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
*At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.*
**About Us**
 Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We put citizens and patients at the center, simplifying everyday life for all, and providing the tools required to transition towards increased self-and preventive care and lower cost-of-care settings.
   

  

 We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.
   

  

**About The Role**
 At Tieto Caretech’s Data Driven Care unit we are reshaping healthcare and social care services by providing our customers with data-driven solutions and cloud data platforms. Our Data & AI focused team consists of high-end professionals working in data science, data engineering, data modeling, data advisory, cloud solutions, security and software development.
   

  

 We are a growing international team of talented, continuously improving experts. With us you get to work with latest technologies, innovative new solutions and create wellbeing for the society.
   

  

 As a Technical Project Manager in our team, we expect you to have a strong will to lead data-driven project deliveries in complex technology environment and bring new value to our customers through pioneering solutions. You will work in close collaboration with our specialized data, AI and healthcare solution teams and product management.
   

  

 We expect you to have a strong will to lead data-driven project deliveries in complex technology environment and bring new value to our customers through pioneering solutions. To succeed in this position, you should have previous experience in project deliveries in the area of Data & AI solutions and know-how of latest cloud and data related technologies as well as the will to continuously learn new things.
   

  

**In this role you will be responsible for**
* Planning new project and service deliveries in close collaboration with development teams, product management and sales
* Leading project and service deliveries and act as a key contact person towards customers
* Ensuring the success of our customers in their operations with our deliveries
* Continuous development of our operations together with colleagues in delivery management, product management and development teams
* Building relationships inside the organization to promote active collaboration


**We are looking for someone with**
* Experience in project management of data-centric solutions
* Practical experience in technical tasks in software development
* Experience in data platforms and cloud environments
* Experience in healthcare and/or social services


**As a person you**
* Have a capability to lead technically complex project and service deliveries with multiple teams and stakeholders
* Have a will to bring new value to society via new revolutionary health and care solutions
* Demonstrate a positive can-do attitude
* Are self-motivated, yet an active team player
* Take pride in coaching and inspiring your colleagues
* Fluent in English and Swedish, both written and spoken.
* Additional language skills, such as German and Spanish, are considered an advantage.


**What’s in it for you?**
 With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.
   

  

 Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.
   

  

**Did we get you inspired?**
 We look forward to your application! If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact Hannu Tissari (hannu.t.tissari@tieto.com).
   

  

 We perform background checks on all final candidates.
   

  

 Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion | Sustainability | Tieto

title: Supply Chain Manager
description:
**Supply Chain Manager till GSAB – en nyckelroll i ett växande bolag** 




**Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens supply chain?** 




  





 GSAB befinner sig i en spännande tillväxt- och utvecklingsfas och söker nu en engagerad Supply Chain Manager som vill vara med och utveckla vår verksamhet. Hos oss får du en central ledarroll med stort ansvar och möjlighet att påverka hela värdekedjan – från inköp och lagerstyrning till produktion och leverans.
 







 Vi söker dig som vill kombinera strategiskt tänkande med operativt ansvar och som motiveras av att leda team, själv vara aktiv i den dagliga verksamheten, driva förbättringar, skapa struktur och bidra till företagets fortsatta utveckling.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Som Supply Chain Manager på GSAB får du en central ledarroll med ansvar för hela försörjningskedjan.
 







 Du leder den dagliga verksamheten inom lager och produktion samtidigt som du ingår i bolagets ledningsgrupp och bidrar till GSAB:s strategiska utveckling. Som medlem i ledningsgruppen får du möjlighet att påverka beslut som formar bolagets framtida utveckling och tillväxt.
 







 Rollen ger en ovanlig möjlighet att kombinera strategiskt ansvar i ledningsgruppen med ett nära engagemang i den dagliga verksamheten.
 







 Rollen passar dig som trivs i ett entreprenörsdrivet företag där beslutsvägarna är korta och där du får möjlighet att arbeta i den operativa verksamheten och påverka företagets framtida utveckling.
 



  





**Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden** 




 ·  Ansvara för inköp, leverantörsrelationer, materialförsörjning och lagerstyrning för att säkerställa hög
 



 leveransförmåga, kostnadseffektivitet och ökad lageromsättningshastighet
 



 ·        Leda och utveckla teamet inom lager och produktion samt säkerställa ett effektivt och väl fungerande dagligt
 



 flöde
 



 ·        Ansvara för uppföljning, analys och utveckling av supply chain-funktionen med fokus på effektivitet, kvalitet och
 



 lönsamhet
 



 ·        Delta i produktutvecklingsprojekt och tvärfunktionella förbättringsinitiativ
 



 ·        Ansvara för att maximera nyttan av bolagets IT-system samt aktivt använda AI-baserade verktyg och datadrivna
 



 arbetssätt för analys, planering och verksamhetsutveckling
 



 ·        Ingå i bolagets ledningsgrupp och bidra till GSAB:s strategiska utveckling, prioriteringar, långsiktiga tillväxt och
 



 lönsamhet
 



**Kvalifikationer och egenskaper** 




 Vi söker dig som har cirka 3–6 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet inom supply chain, logistik, produktion, inköp eller liknande områden och som nu vill ta nästa steg i karriären genom att ta ett större helhetsansvar.
 







 Du är analytisk, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad. Du trivs med att ta egna initiativ, gillar att driva förbättringar och har förmågan att omsätta idéer till konkreta resultat.
 



**Vi tror att du har** 




 ·        Civilingenjörsexamen eller annan relevant högskoleutbildning med inriktning mot Supply Chain, logistik,
 



 industriell ekonomi eller liknande
 



 ·        Erfarenhet av supply chain, logistik, produktion och inköp
 



 ·        God analytisk förmåga och ett datadrivet arbetssätt
 



 ·        Intresse för processutveckling och verksamhetsförbättringar
 



 ·        God förmåga att arbeta både självständigt och tillsammans med andra
 



 ·        Naturliga ledaregenskaper samt förmåga att bygga förtroende och skapa goda relationer, såväl internt som
 



 externt
 



 ·        Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska samt en god kommunikativ förmåga
 



 ·        Ett intresse för ny teknik och en vilja att använda AI och digitala verktyg för att skapa bättre beslut och
 



 effektivare arbetssätt
 



**Som person är du** 




 ·        Driven, initiativrik och ansvarstagande
 



 ·        Strukturerad och noggrann
 



 ·        Prestigelös och samarbetsorienterad
 



 ·        Nyfiken och utvecklingsinriktad
 



 ·        En ledare som skapar engagemang, förtroende och resultat
 



 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlighet, ambition och vilja att utvecklas tillsammans med oss.
 



  





**Om GSAB** 




 Med fokus på arkitektoniska glaslösningar strävar vi efter att lösa utmaningar genom design, innovation och hållbarhet. Vi utvecklar, tillverkar och levererar glasväggar, räcken, duschväggar och andra produkter till glas- och byggbranschen.
 







 Inom GSAB finns även varumärket Invitrea, där vi utvecklar egna produkter inom kategorierna Room, Railing, Bath, Exterior och Interior.
 







 Vi är ett entreprenörsdrivet bolag med korta beslutsvägar och stort engagemang. Hos oss arbetar du nära verksamheten och får möjlighet att påverka på riktigt. Dina idéer kan snabbt omsättas till verklighet och du kommer att vara en viktig del av vår fortsatta tillväxtresa.
 







 Vi är ett sammansvetsat team som har roligt tillsammans samtidigt som vi har höga ambitioner för framtiden.
 



**Praktisk information** 




 ·        Placering: Länna (kontor, lager och produktion samlat)
 



 ·        Omfattning: Heltid
 



 ·        Tjänstebil: Möjlighet finns
 



**Frågor och kontakt** 




 Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta:
 



 Jan Kraft: jan.kraft@gsab.se, +46 (0)701 040 555.
 







 Din ansökan vill vi ha snarast, dock senast 3 juli. Intervjuer och urval görs löpande.
 







 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Influencer Lead - H&M Global Marketing
description:
**Job Description**

 As our Influencer Lead, you will be responsible for driving the execution of global influencer marketing strategies across markets. You’ll lead the development and activation of culturally relevant, high-performing influencer campaigns that support both brand and business goals. Acting as a strategic connector between global and local teams, you’ll ensure campaigns are locally resonant, globally aligned, and creatively impactful.
   

  





 Your role will be both strategic and hands-on, with direct ownership of influencer planning, creative oversight, performance tracking, and team leadership across regions.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**



* Lead regional execution of global influencer strategies, ensuring alignment with brand objectives and local market insights to drive relevance and impact.
* Adapt and localise global campaign frameworks to meet individual market needs, maintaining creative consistency, quality, and brand integrity across all touchpoints.
* Build and nurture strong relationships with top-performing influencers and agencies in key regional markets, using data-driven evaluation to guide selection and collaboration.
* Guide the creation of engaging, authentic short-form content (TikTok, Reels), supporting teams to produce locally resonant storytelling that reflects brand values.
* Provide strategic and creative input throughout campaign development and content ideation, partnering closely with global and local teams to ensure cohesion and innovation.
* Oversee campaign performance and internal processes, ensuring high-quality stakeholder engagement, cross-functional alignment, and timely delivery of goals and assets.
* Manage global influencer marketing budgets, allocate resources effectively, and share actionable insights based on regional trends, platform updates, and performance metrics.



**WHO YOU ARE**




 We’re looking for a culturally connected leader with a strategic mindset and deep expertise in influencer marketing across regions.
   

  





 We are looking for people with....
   

  




* Proven experience in influencer marketing, with a strong track record of leading campaigns across multiple markets.
* Deep understanding of short-form content and the creator landscape, particularly on TikTok and Instagram - paired with a creative eye and strategic mindset for content ideation and campaign development.
* Skilled in stakeholder management and confident collaborating across global and local teams to drive results.
* Experienced in managing budgets and optimising spend for performance, with a data-informed approach supported by familiarity with social analytics tools and the ability to translate insights into meaningful strategy.
* A collaborative, solutions-focused approach and a high level of adaptability.
* Experience in team leadership, coaching, or mentoring within a marketing or creative function.



 And people who are...
   

  




* Detail-oriented and highly organized.
* Confident presenting ideas and results.
* Comfortable juggling multiple projects and deliverables simultaneously.
* A natural collaborator who thrives in a fast-paced, creative environment.
* Passionate about connecting with audiences through authentic, culture-driven storytelling.



**WHO WE ARE**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  

  

  

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
  

  





 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits and extensive development opportunities across the globe. You’ll be part of a collaborative environment where your ideas matter.
   

  

  

  

**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things - our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





**This is a full-time permanent position based in Stockholm. Please apply as soon as possible by submitting your CV in English.** 
 Due to data privacy regulations, we only accept applications through our career page.
   

  





***We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.***



**Additional Information**

title: Office Coordinator
description:
**Job Description**
**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
 Office Coordinator ansvarar för att skapa en välfungerande, professionell och trivsam kontorsmiljö genom att koordinera kontorsadministration, ta emot externa besökare samt stötta interna funktioner i det dagliga arbetet. Rollen omfattar koordinering av introduktion för nyanställda, stöd i frågor kopplade till arbetsmiljö, kontorssäkerhet, fastighet och teknik samt administrativt stöd och aktiviteter som stärker intern kultur och varumärke.
   

  

 I rollen ingår att vara en serviceinriktad och proaktiv kontaktperson för både medarbetare, besökare och leverantörer. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med Office Manager och kräver förmåga att vara lyhörd, se verksamhetens behov och ta initiativ till det som behöver göras – även utanför det som står beskrivet i arbetsuppgifter och rutiner.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden**
 Konkret beskrivning av ansvarsområden
   

  

* Reception och besöksservice
* Kontorsadministration och resursförvaltning (inkl. nycklar och passerkort)
* Koordinering av onboardingaktiviteter och administrativ support kopplat till introduktion av nyanställda
* Praktiskt stöd och koordinering kopplat till kontorssäkerhet, utrymningsrutiner, larmgrupp och arbetsplatsrelaterade frågor
* Fastighets- och teknikstöd för kontorsdelen (Hard FM) – felanmälan, leverantörskontakter, enklare kontroller och samordning av underhåll
* Administrativt stöd till interna funktioner såsom ekonomi, inköp, EHS och ledning
* Branding och aktiviteter som stärker företagets kultur
* Planera och arrangera event för anställda tillsammans med OM
* Administrativ koordinering av EHS-relaterade utbildningar, offertförfrågningar, bokningar, kallelser, PR-hantering och diplomatisk administration


**Samverkan**
 Samverkansbehov med följande funktioner
   

  

 Office-koordinatorn behöver samarbeta nära med interna stödfunktioner såsom ekonomi, inköp, EHS och ledning samt externa leverantörer och servicepartners.
   

  

**Befogenheter**
 Konkret beskrivning av befogenheter, t.ex. vad avser beslut eller attest
   

  

 Befogenhet att fatta praktiska beslut kring kontorsservice, beställningar, felanmälan och enklare administrativa ärenden. Större beslut tas i samråd med Office Manager.
   

  

**Kvalifikationskrav**
 Allmänt / Kompetensnivå
   

  

* God samarbetsförmåga och servicekänsla
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och ta initiativ
* Grundläggande IT-kunskaper och vana vid digitala verktyg
* Kommunikativ och strukturerad


**Språkkrav**
* Svenska i tal och skrift
* Engelska i tal och skrift


**Övrigt**
* B-körkort


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av administrativt arbete och kontorsservice


**About Us**
 Coherent is a global leader in lasers, engineered materials and networking components. We are a vertically integrated manufacturing company that develops innovative products for diversified applications in the industrial, optical communications, military, life sciences, semiconductor equipment, and consumer markets. Coherent provides a comprehensive career development platform within an environment that challenges employees to perform at their best, while rewarding excellence and hard-work through a competitive compensation program. It's an exciting opportunity to work for a company that offers stability, longevity and growth. Come Join Us!
   

  

**Note to recruiters and employment agencies:** 
 We will not pay for unsolicited resumes from recruiters and employment agencies unless we have a signed agreement and have required assistance, in writing, for a specific opening.

title: IAM Advisor
description:
Clavister är en ledande aktör inom identitetslösningar och nätverkssäkerhet som hjälper organisationer att skydda sina mest värdefulla tillgångar i en allt mer komplex digital värld. Genom innovativa lösningar och ett nära samarbete med kunder och partners skapar vi förutsättningar för trygg, skalbar och modern IT-säkerhet.
   

  

 Hos Clavister blir du en del av ett specialistteam med hög kompetens inom cybersäkerhet, identitet och digital transformation – i en kultur som präglas av samarbete, professionalism och tekniskt djup.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker nu en IAM Advisor med stark kompetens inom Identity & Access Management, där erfarenhet inom Identity Governance (IDG) och Identity Management (IDM) är särskilt viktig.
   

  

 Det här är en rådgivande och affärsnära specialistroll där du arbetar nära kunder för att förstå deras verksamhetskritiska behov inom identitet, access och säkerhet. Fokus ligger inte primärt på traditionell ”hunter”-försäljning, utan på att kunna driva konsultativa dialoger och skapa förtroende hos kunder genom kompetens och förståelse för IAM-domänen.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta med komplexa lösningar och strategiska kunddialoger inom bland annat:
   

  

* Identity & Access Management (IAM)
* Identity Governance & Administration (IGA/IDG)
* Identity Management (IDM)
* Privileged Access Management (PAM)
* Relaterade säkerhets- och integrationslösningar


 I rollen samarbetar du tätt med både kunder, tekniska specialister och partners. Du fungerar som en rådgivare i kundernas säkerhetsresa och hjälper dem att omsätta tekniska krav till affärsvärde och långsiktiga strategier.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har en stark förståelse för IAM-området och som trivs i en konsultativ och rådgivande roll. Du behöver inte komma från en renodlad säljbakgrund – det viktigaste är att du har erfarenhet av att arbeta nära kunder och kan skapa förtroende genom din kompetens.
   

  

 Du är kommunikativ, relationsskapande och trygg i dialoger med både tekniska specialister och beslutsfattare. Du har förmåga att förstå kundens verksamhet och omsätta komplexa säkerhetsbehov till tydliga lösningsförslag.
   

  

**Krav för tjänsten**
**Mycket viktigt**
* Djup kompetens inom IAM-domänen
* Erfarenhet av Identity Governance (IDG/IGA) och/eller Identity Management (IDM)
* Erfarenhet av konsultativt arbete nära kunder inom IAM
* Förmåga att driva rådgivande dialoger med både verksamhet och IT
* God förståelse för komplexa säkerhetsmiljöer och identitetsrelaterade processer
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Viktigt men inte avgörande**
* Erfarenhet av affärsutveckling, presales eller lösningsförsäljning
* Erfarenhet av enterprise-kunder och längre sälj- eller införandeprocesser
* Kunskap inom PAM eller närliggande säkerhetsområden
* Erfarenhet av nätverkssäkerhet
* Erfarenhet av kunder inom offentlig sektor, försvar eller samhällskritisk verksamhet
* Förståelse för regulatoriska krav och säkerhetsramverk kopplade till identitet och cybersäkerhet, exempelvis NIS2 eller europeiska säkerhetskrav
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla nya kundsegment, erbjudanden eller affärsområden


**Varför Clavister?**
 Här får du möjlighet att arbeta med marknadsledande säkerhetslösningar tillsammans med några av branschens främsta specialister. Du får stort inflytande över din roll och möjlighet att utvecklas både tekniskt och affärsmässigt.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en miljö där kompetens, innovation och samarbete står i centrum – och där din expertis inom IAM kommer att spela en central roll i våra kunders framtida säkerhetsstrategier.
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens identitets- och säkerhetslösningar?
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan.
   

  

 Urval och intervjuer sker löpande, så vänta inte med din ansökan. Om du vill arbeta med affärer som gör verklig skillnad för Europas digitala säkerhet, ser vi fram emot att höra från dig redan idag.
   

  

 Tjänsten inleds med en provanställning på sex månader.

title: Senior Information Architect (Semantic modelling)
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**



* Lead the design, maintenance, and evolution of conceptual and logical information models that enable shared understanding of core business concepts across the organization.
* Own and contribute to central information architecture artefacts such as the Enterprise Data Model and Data Domain Map, ensuring alignment across domains and initiatives.
* Drive the definition and consistent use of business terminology, taxonomies, and ontologies, enabling a common language between business and technology.
* Collaborate closely with business stakeholders, data product teams, solution architects, and engineers to translate business needs into clear information models that guide downstream implementations.
* Define and maintain standards, guardrails, and best practices for information architecture and modelling, ensuring they are pragmatic and usable in a fast‑changing environment.
* Ensure that information models support interoperability, reuse, and long‑term scalability across the solution landscape.
* Assess current (as‑is) data flows for core business objects and design target (to‑be) views that support future business needs.
* Actively support and enable data governance and metadata practices, in close collaboration with Data Governance colleagues.
* Educate, guide, and coach stakeholders and architects, helping to embed information architecture thinking across teams.
* Contribute to continuous improvement of architecture tooling and ways of working, including integration with data catalogues and metadata management tools.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**




 You will work closely with business domain experts, Data Domain Owners, Data Stewards, solution architects, data engineers, analytics teams, and data governance colleagues.
   

  

 Together, you will establish shared language, trusted information structures, and clear architectural guidance that support data‑driven initiatives and future AI and analytics use cases.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for someone who has:
   

  




* Several years of experience working as an Information Architect or in closely related architecture roles, with a strong focus on conceptual and logical modelling.
* Proven ability to translate complex business concepts into clear information models, taxonomies, and definitions.
* Experience working with enterprise‑level architecture artefacts such as enterprise data models, domain maps, or similar structures.
* Strong understanding of how information architecture, data management, and data governance work together.
* Experience defining and documenting standards, guardrails, and modelling guidelines.
* Hands‑on experience with architecture and modelling tools (e.g. Sparx EA, Erwin, LeanIX or similar) and familiarity with data catalogues or metadata tooling.
* Hands‑on experience with ontology or semantic standards (e.g. RDF, OWL, SKOS, SPARQL) or equivalent conceptual modelling approaches.
* Strong communication and facilitation skills, with the ability to educate and influence both business and technical stakeholders.



 And someone who:
   

  




* Has a holistic mindset, seeing the big picture while still being able to work hands‑on with models and definitions.
* Is comfortable operating in a low‑maturity environment, helping the organisation move step‑by‑step toward more structured and shared ways of working.
* Can take ownership, work independently, and drive progress without everything being fully defined upfront.
* Enjoys mentoring and coaching others, contributing to a strong and collaborative architecture community.
* Is curious, pragmatic, and motivated to continuously improve how information is structured and understood across the organisation.



  

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

**WHO WE ARE** 
 ​
   

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 ​We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





**​WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
 ​
   

  





 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





**JOIN US​** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 ​Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 ​
 *\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​*

title: Operations Manager France
description:
Are you structured, technically curious, and motivated by solving real operational problems? Do you want to work hands-on with data, systems, and remote troubleshooting in the transition to electric heavy duty transport? This role sits at the core of making charging operations work.
   

  

 The role is preferably based in France preferably in the capital region.
   

  

**About Erinion**
 Erinion designs, builds and operates depot and destination charging solutions for heavy-duty vehicles. As part of the Scania Group, we combine the strength of a global transport leader with the agility of a fast-growing company. Our approach focuses on energy efficiency and optimal utilisation, ensuring that electrification is not only sustainable but also financially and commercially viable for our customers. We support different ways of financing, owning and operating charging sites, so that each customer can find the model that best fits their business. With operations across eight European markets and global expansion underway, we enable transport operators to electrify their fleets with confidence and long-term profitability.
   

  

 The role
   

  

 As Operations Manager for France, you own the operational performance of charging sites with a strong focus on remote troubleshooting, system behaviour, and data-driven decisions.
   

  

 You spend a significant part of your time working in systems, analysing issues, identifying root causes, and resolving incidents without physical intervention. You act as the link between customers, service partners, and internal tech teams. You will also perform customer handovers on site as well as in depth trainings in charging and charging systems.
   

  

 Your responsibilities
   

  

**Remote troubleshooting & technical operations**
* Perform advanced troubleshooting in CMS and connected systems
* Analyse logs, error patterns, and system behaviour to identify and resolve root causes
* Ensure configurations, firmware, and connectivity are correct and stable


**Operational performance & incident management**
* Own uptime and daily operational stability for customers in France
* Monitor performance and proactively address deviations
* Handle incidents end-to-end with clear communication and documentation


**Service partner coordination**
* Coordinate on-site interventions when remote resolution is not possible
* Ensure high quality and SLA adherence


**Customer onboarding & handover**
* Conduct customer handovers and training in charging operations and system usage
* Ensure customers are set up to operate sites efficiently from day one


**Data, reporting & optimisation**
* Work actively with operational data (uptime, utilisation, case patterns)
* Drive improvements based on data and recurring issues


 Your Profile
   

  

 We are looking for someone who combines a strong technical mindset with the ability to drive operational performance and resolve complex system issues. In this role, you take ownership of keeping operations stable and running smoothly. You are structured and organised, able to manage multiple parallel cases, and curious about how systems behave and where issues arise. You communicate clearly and work with systems, data, and stakeholders to ensure reliable and efficient operations.
   

  

**Experience**
* Background in operations, technical support, service coordination, or similar
* Experience with incident handling or system-based troubleshooting


**Technical mindset**
* Strong technical interest with a curiosity to understand how systems work
* Comfortable working in systems (CMS, CRM, logs, dashboards)
* Interested in how data, automation, and emerging technologies can improve operations


**Communication & Mobility**
* Fluent in French and English, written and spoken
* Open to travel, including occasional on-site visits and customer interactions


**Nice to have**
* Experience from EV charging, energy, automotive, or similar technical domain
* Understanding of OCPP, charging systems, or connected hardware


 Our Offer
   

  

 Join our passionate team and be a driving force in the future of sustainable transportation. At Erinion, you won't just be a part of the change, you'll be pioneering it. We offer a competitive compensation package, alongside unparalleled professional growth opportunities. This is an early-stage company where your ideas are valued, your contributions have a significant impact, and you have the chance to develop and grow alongside Erinion.
   

  

 Further Information and Application
   

  

 We are driven by our belief that the power of diversity fuels innovation. We welcome individuals from all backgrounds, cultures, and perspectives to join our team. We are working with an ongoing selection; please apply as soon as possible if you are interested, but no later than 2026-06-30. Your application should include your CV and certificate of your highest finished degree. Please note that we cannot accept applications over email. If you have any further questions contact Sebastian Glaas, at sebastian.glaas@andpartners.se. A background check might be conducted for this position.
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description:
Anyfin is building the next generation of consumer finance. We’re profitable, scaling quickly and now operating with a banking license which opens up a lot of technical complexity.
   

  

 We’re looking for a senior cloud engineer who enjoys moving fast, taking real ownership and building systems that actually have an impact.
   

  

 If that sounds like your kind of environment, keep reading. Because honestly, it’s not a role for everyone.
   

  

**Small team, high responsibility**
 We hire carefully. We’re not a company that grows by adding headcount everywhere, we grow by keeping the bar high and building a team where every person matters.
   

  

 This isn’t a place where you disappear into a big org. If you join, you’ll have real influence on what we build and how we build it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Designing, deploying and operating cloud infrastructure and services on GCP to support scalable and reliable systems.
* Building, optimizing and scaling backend systems with a cloud-first mindset, using Node.js and SQL (Postgres).
* Contributing to system architecture to ensure cloud scalability, reliability and maintainability of financial systems.
* Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to shape both product direction and business strategy.
* Sharing cloud and infrastructure expertise with the team while promoting best practices.


 Our main stack is TypeScript, Node.js, React, React Native running on Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

**How We Think About Building**
 We’re pragmatic. We like speed, but we also care about building things that last.
   

  

 AI isn’t a side tool here. It’s embedded in how we work helping engineers move faster, reduce friction and focus on solving meaningful problems.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers who are curious about that shift and want to be part of it, rather than people who feel like good engineering means doing everything the hard way.
   

  

 No ego. Just good judgment and high output.
   

  

**You’ll thrive here if you…**
* Have solid experience building backend systems with cloud-first practices and working with cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, or Azure.
* Care about craftsmanship, performance and reliability in the systems you build.
* Take responsibility naturally and don’t wait to be told what to do.
* Enjoy messy problems and figuring things out as you go.
* Like being in an ambitious and collaborative team.
* Want to build, not just maintain.


**You’re Comfortable With Things Like**
* Strong background in cloud infrastructure and backend development with Node.js and SQL databases (preferably Postgres).
* Experience in designing, deploying and monitoring solutions on major cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, or Azure.
* At least 5 years of professional experience, ideally in high-stakes environments like finance.
* Passionate about solving complex backend and cloud problems with clean, pragmatic solutions.
* Solid understanding of system design and architecture.
* Bonus if you’ve worked with React, Python, Go, GraphQL, Kubernetes, or DevOps with Github Actions.


**A few practical notes**
* Stockholm based.
* EU work authorization required


**Why Anyfin?**
 Because this is one of those moments where a company is about to level up: Banking license secured, expansion ahead and a lot to build.
   

  

 If you want to be part of a small, high-trust team doing meaningful work, we’d love to hear from you. Apply only if you want the responsibility that comes with real impact.
   

  

 Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

title: Driftoperatör Transmission
description:
**Teledriftcentralen ingår i FMTIS Driftenheten och ansvarar för driftövervakning och driftledning av Försvarsmaktens telenät. Vi söker nu en driftoperatör inom transmission till vår driftcentral i Bålsta.
   

  

 Om enheten**
 Driftenheten tillhörandes FMTIS, genomför driftövervakning samt underhåll och fjärravhjälpande åtgärder inom FM strategiska nät, vilket är en förutsättning för Försvarsmaktens ledningsförmåga i fred, kris och krig.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
 Tjänsten som driftoperatör vid Nätdriftavdelningen omfattar ett varierat arbete där du kommer att driftövervaka och driftleda en mängd olika system. Du kommer att ta emot, analysera och registrera avvikelser i nät, tjänster och utrustningar samt initiera och följa upp felavhjälpning vid yttre anläggningar.
   

  

 Som driftoperatör kommer du att få en grundutbildning inom samtliga av Nätdriftavdelningens fördjupningsområden: Transmission, IP, Satellitkommunikation och Radio/Sensor, men du kommer bli specialiserad inom transmission.
   

  

 Tjänsten inkluderar kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling innefattande ett flertal interna och externa kurser och utbildningar. Detta innebär en del resor till andra orter, för att kunna genomföra dessa kurser och utbildningar. Vidare innebär tjänsten att du delvis kommer att tjänstgöra som vakthavande systemoperatör, vilket innebär att tjänstgöring förekommer på oregelbundna arbetstider inklusive jour-, och beredskapstjänstgöring. Dessa tillfällen planeras i samråd med arbetsgivaren för att möjliggöra en god balans mellan arbete och fritid.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Verksamheten erbjuder stor variation och komplexitet samt ställer stora krav på IT-säkerhet vilket innebär goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet. Våra anställda har ett flertal olika förmåner, bland annat:
   

  

* Kompetensutveckling utifrån verksamhetens behov och dina karriärsmål
* Tre timmar träning i veckan på arbetstid och du kan få ersättning för träningskläder och startavgifter
* Bra balans mellan arbete och fritid med flexibel arbetstid samt 28 - 35 semesterdagar beroende på din ålder
* Lönetillägg vid föräldraledighet och VAB samt möjlighet att växla semesterdagar mot extra pensionsavsättning


**Kvalifikationer**
* Lägst gymnasieutbildning med teknisk inriktning eller motsvarande som av arbetsgivaren kan bedömas likvärdig.
* Goda kunskaper inom transmissionsteknik: WDM Radiolänkar PDH/SDH Telefonväxlar
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, såväl i tal som i skrift.
* B-körkort.


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av driftövervakning och ärendehantering för stora driftverksamheter.
* Kunskap inom IP-teknik, TCP/IP, routing/routingprotokoll, switching och DNS.
* Kunskap inom nätverksteknik och brandväggssystem.
* Kunskap inom radarteknik eller radiosystem.


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som är lösningsorienterad och stabil. Du är en god lagkamrat samtidigt som du gärna tar initiativ och eget ansvar. För att trivas i rollen som driftoperatör är det en förutsättning att du har ett intresse för teknik i allmänhet och IT-drift i synnerhet. Du förstår att du inte kan allt men du vill och har förmågan att fördjupa dig och ta till dig ny kunskap.
   

  

* Du är serviceinriktad och lösningsorienterad.
* Du är driven och initiativtagande samt tar ansvar för att driva uppgifter framåt.
* Du arbetar strukturerat och har god vana av att upprätthålla tydlig dokumentation.
* Du har god samarbetsförmåga och trivs även att arbeta i grupp.
* Du har mycket god förmåga att arbeta självständigt och fatta egna beslut.
* Du har förmåga att skapa och bibehålla goda relationer med såväl interna som externa kontakter.
* Du har ett brinnande intresse för teknik och kan tillgodogöra dig teknisk information och utbildning.


 Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  

*För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på www.forsvarsmakten.se)*
**Övrigt**
 Befattningen är en tillsvidareanställning som civilt anställd och inleds med sex månaders provanställning för dig som inte är anställd inom Försvarsmakten.
   

  

 Arbetsort: Bålsta. Tjänstgöring på andra orter och tjänsteresor förekommer.
   

  

 Tjänsten omfattar heltid, vanligen vardagar men jour, beredskap, övertid och FM-dygn förekommer.
   

  

 Vid en anställning kommer du att bli krigsplacerad.
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt ök
   

  

**För upplysningar om befattningen kontakta:**
 Information om rekryteringsprocessen och befattningen kontakta: fmtis-drifte-natdrifta-rekrytering@mil.se. Ange ”Transmission Bålsta” i ämnesraden.
   

  

**Fackliga företrädare**
 SACO Agneta Landquist
   

  

 OFR/S Martin Sparr
   

  

 SEKO Matz Felix
   

  

 OFR/O Heikki Videll
   

  

 Samtliga nås genom växeln: 019-39 35 00
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag**
 Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-08-30
   

  

 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Information om Försvarsmakten och det rekryterande förbandet: Försvarsmaktens telekommunikations- och informationssystemförband, FMTIS, säkerställer Försvarsmaktens förmåga att kommunicera och leda - dygnet runt, året om.
