title: Data Analyst II
description:
**ABOUT SINCH**  

Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email. Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey. At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**DESCRIPTION**  

At Sinch, our focus is on driving growth through data-driven commercial strategies. As a Data Analyst specializing in CRM reporting and analytics within our Data Analytics department, you will play an essential role in guiding our sales and marketing strategies and building operational efficiency. You will partner closely with Sales, Marketing, Operations, and Finance leaders to translate Salesforce and related CRM data into high-quality, actionable insights across the entire sales funnel. In this role, you will work closely with multifunctional teams and be part of a modern analytics setup using advanced tools like Snowflake, dbt, and Tableau.


Please note: This is a one-year fixed-term contract, covering colleagues on parental leave. The role is designed to ensure continuity in analytics delivery and stakeholder support during this period.


* **Key Responsibilities**  

CRM Reporting & Dashboarding: Design, build, and maintain robust dashboards and reports in Tableau and Salesforce to track KPIs related to sales pipeline, customer lifecycle, and sales team performance.
* Sales Funnel Analysis: Analyze the entire sales and marketing funnel, identifying trends, bottlenecks, and opportunities for optimization.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Partner closely with Sales, Marketing, and Finance leaders to deliver actionable insights that support strategic and tactical decisions.
* Data Integrity & Governance: Act as a subject matter expert on CRM data, ensuring data quality and accuracy within Salesforce and related reporting environments.
* Empower Sales Teams: Create and manage user-friendly dashboards that provide self-service analytics, enabling sales representatives and managers to monitor performance effectively.
* Analytics Support & Culture: Act as a key point of contact for internal analytics users by managing support requests, investigating issues, and helping spread a strong data-driven culture by training and supporting stakeholders.
* **REQUIREMENTS**  

CRM & Visualization Tools: Proven experience working directly with Salesforce (or similar CRM), including report building and data models, plus at least 2 years of experience creating dashboards in Tableau.
* Technical & Analytical Skills: At least 2 years of experience working with SQL (or a comparable track record in analyzing large structured and unstructured datasets) is a big plus.
* Education & Professional Experience: A bachelor’s or master’s degree in a quantitative or business-related field (e.g., finance, economics, mathematics, computer science, engineering) is desirable, along with experience collaborating with commercial stakeholders (Sales, Marketing, Finance).
* Communication & Language: Fluency in English (both written and spoken) is required, with strong skills in expressing ideas and complex data insights clearly to diverse audiences.
* Industry & Global Context: Experience working in a global company and/or within a Tech, SaaS, or B2B Telecom setting is highly preferred.
* Professional Qualities: A growth-oriented, detail-oriented, and highly adaptable mindset, with strong emotional intelligence and collaboration skills to build effective working relationships.

**Salary:**

The monthly salary for this position is between 35,266 SEK - 44083 SEK. Factors which may affect pay within this range may include skills, education, experience, and other qualifications.


Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English.


**OUR HIRING PROCESS**  

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel. We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Service Delivery Manager
description:
Telia Cygate is growing and is now looking for a **Service Delivery Manager** for our Secure Connect offering. We are passionate about structure and order, love communication, and continuously work on developing our services for our customers. Are you ready for your next opportunity and want to grow together with us?


My name is Jelena Lazarevic, and I am responsible for the Project Management Team at Telia Cygate Region East. Our focus is on follow-up and development of our services for our customers. In this role, you will take on a crucial responsibility in ensuring our customers are satisfied with our delivery.


Do you want to be part of a customer-focused team where, together with your colleagues, you take strong ownership of developing our offering for the real estate industry? Then take the opportunity to join us! We are looking for a Service Delivery Manager with a strong business mindset and high personal drive.


**What you’ll do:**

As a Service Delivery Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, development, and optimization of the entire customer solution throughout the contract period. You will maintain continuous dialogue with customers, conduct customer meetings with follow-ups on delivered services, and contribute to the development of our business. You will work proactively to support positive development and growth within our customer engagements.


In this role, you will have operational responsibility for several customers. You will be part of a team of specialists working with our real estate customers, where you jointly develop strategies on how to grow our business and offering, as well as how to best support the customer’s operations using Telia’s business services. Your specific responsibility is to ensure that Telia Cygate meets the customer’s expectations according to the agreement.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**

You are a proactive and business-driven person who enjoys working closely with customers and taking real ownership of your delivery. You build trust naturally through clear communication, reliability, and a genuine interest in understanding the customer’s needs. You feel comfortable navigating complex environments where both technology and relationships play an important role.


You are structured and solution-oriented, with the ability to balance day-to-day operational work while also spotting opportunities for improvement and growth. You don’t wait for things to happen - you take initiative, drive conversations forward, and contribute to creating long-term value both for the customer and the business.


* Proven experience in Service Delivery Management within IT or telecom
* Solid understanding of IT service management frameworks such as ITIL and how they are applied in practice
* Strong ability to manage multiple stakeholders and build long-term, trust-based relationships
* Experience driving customer dialogue, service follow-ups, and continuous improvement initiatives
* Experience working with customers in the real estate industry is a strong advantage
* Native or near-native fluency in Swedish is required, along with strong English skills

**Why Telia Cygate?**

At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate is proud to be certificated as Great Place to Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Interested? Apply!**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-06-28.** Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: **Solna**

If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner.**  

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Jelena Lazarevic at jelena.lazarevic@cygate.se.


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: KAM Support - Operations Analyst
description:
#### **Job details**


Posted 15 June 2026
Salary Negotiable
LocationSweden
Job type Contract
Discipline Professional Services
Reference112602\_1781522038
#### **Job description**


Position: **KAM Support - Operations Analyst**


Sector: **Automotive**


Location: **Gothenburg Hybrid Working**


Position Type: **Contract or Permanent**

\*Applicants MUST already be onsite in Sweden and have proof of immediate, on-going and valid eligibility to work full time in the Sweden.\*


We are looking for an experienced and commercially minded Finance & Commercial Operations


Analyst to join our Cloud & Connectivity business in Gothenburg. This is a role at the intersection of finance, sales, and operations, working closely with our Procurement, Finance, Commercial leads with occasional direct contact with customers and suppliers. The assignment is structured around clear milestones with increasing responsibility over the first nine months.

  

  

**The assignment**

Months 1-3 | Foundation & Relationship Building


Align and work with suppliers and customers on billing reports, get to know the business, conduct contractual reviews, and investigate areas of improvement across processes and commercial performance.

  

  

Months 3-6 | Strategic Finance & Commercial Administration


Work more strategically as a finance, sales, and cost administrator - gathering stakeholders in


meetings, collecting and consolidating the numbers, performing calculations, and identifying


improvements across the cloud and connectivity portfolio.

  

  

Months 6+ | Insights, Improvement & Executive Presence


Consolidate the identified areas of improvement and define how they can be addressed. Present status updates in weekly C-suite and SVP meetings, including preparing and executing presentations. This is intended to be a role in which the right person can grow.  

  



**Required Qualifications and Skills**


* Minimum 3-5 years of experience in finance, commercial operations, business controlling, or a related field
* An interest in or understanding of cloud services, connectivity, or the broader technology industry
* Strong analytical skills with a structured, methodical approach to problem-solving and process improvement
* Proven ability to manage and influence stakeholders at multiple levels of an organization, with confidence to present to senior leadership
* Proficiency in Excel or equivalent financial tools; experience with ERP, billing systems, or cloud cost management platforms is an advantage
* Fluency in English, the working language; additional languages particularly Swedish or Mandarin are an advantage
* Advanced Excel or equivalent financial analysis tools required. Experience with ERP systems, billing systems, cloud cost management platforms is an advantage.

**Personal attributes**


* A proactive, self-driven individual who takes initiative and thrives in a fast-paced environment.
* Strong communicator with excellent stakeholder management skills, comfortable working cross-functionally and presenting to senior leadership.
* Structured, analytical, and improvement-oriented, with the ambition to grow into a broader role over time.

**Why work through Contechs?**  

Contechs is a leading Automotive, Design, Engineering, Technology and Innovation Recruitment Consultancy. Founded in 1997, with an inhouse Contractor Care Team to support all external employees, acts as an employment agency for permanent and contract recruitment.


**How to Apply**


If you're interested in applying for this position, submit your application and one of our recruiters will be in touch.


**If you know anyone that is suitable for the role, please visit the below page where we offer up to £600 referral fee:** **https://www.contechs.com/refer**

title: Strategic Account Executive
description:
Country/Region: SE
State: AB
City: Stockholm
Job ID: 16729
**Strategic Account Executive**
===============================

**Our Opportunity**
-------------------

  

**Work Location:** Sweden, flexability to be based remotly in-country

  

**Roster:** 5 Days / 2 Off

  

**Role overview**


Elysia is seeking a Strategic Enterprise Account Executive to drive expansion across our European Automotive OEM business owning the relationship with our most strategic regional customers. The Strategic Account Executive will be responsible for developing, managing, and expanding complex strategic relationships with major European automotive OEMs to accelerate adoption of Elysia Battery Intelligence offerings. This role requires deep understanding of European automotive market dynamics, regulatory environment and the ability to navigate complex organisational structures within established automotive OEMs.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

  

**Strategic Account Development**
  

o Lead high-value strategic sales engagements, from prospecting and proposal development to contract negotiation and deal execution through ownership of the end-to-end sales cycle.
  

o Build and deepen senior executive relationships with OEMs, across commercial, engineering, software, and sustainability teams.
  

o Create and execute multi-year strategic account plans that align Elysia solutions with OEM business objectives and outcomes including customer technology roadmaps.
  

o Negotiate multi-year enterprise agreements that align with customer goals and Elysia’s growth objectives, including recurring revenue structures, and software licensing agreements.
  

o Effectively articulate the value of Elysia products, leveraging data-driven insights to support business cases, communicating product features, technical differentiation and value.
  

o Work cross-functionally with Elysia teams including Deployment Strategists, Sales-Ops, Marketing and Product.
  

o Act as trusted advisor to OEM decision makers on safety and sustainability initiatives and emerging automotive EV related technologies.
  

o Develop and maintain executive top-to-top engagements across OEMs and Elysia leadership.

  

  

**Revenue Growth and Opportunity Management**
  

o Manage and drive revenue growth within assigned European OEM accounts to meet and exceed quarterly and yearly goals.
  

o Manage complex, multi-stakeholder sales processes with typical cycles of 6-18 months.
  

o Lead contract negotiations for enterprise agreements, framework contracts, and multi-year strategic partnership agreements.
  

o Collaborate with legal and procurement teams on complex commercial terms and European-specific contractual requirements.
  

o Drive up-sell and cross-sell opportunities, increasing customer value through consultative sales and customer obsessed approach.
  

o Manage opportunity pipeline and sales / opportunity development and forecasting including a keen eye for detail with Salesforce CRM.  



**Qualifications and Experience**
---------------------------------

  

**Key Experience**
  

o Software sales expertise including 5+ years of experience in enterprise B2B software sales, ideally with cloud, embedded software or data and AI solutions.
  

o Consultative selling and enterprise engagement including a track record of navigating complex, multi-stakeholder sales cycles, and developing long-term customer relationships.
  

o Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills, with the ability to influence and build trust with senior customer executives and internal (Elysia) audiences.
  

o Automotive and / or battery-based knowledge including an understanding of the automotive sector and automotive trends.
  

o Commercial and strategic acumen with ability to negotiate complex high-value contracts, and drive revenue growth with a proven ability to close enterprise deals.

  

**Preferred Qualifications**
  

o Existing network and relationships with key decision-makers at global automotive OEMs.
  

o Passionate about sustainability, electrification, and future mobility.
  

o Technical background in automotive engineering, software development, or manufacturing.
  

o Experience working with automotive OEM innovation labs.
  

o Multilingual capabilities (German, French, Italian, or other European languages).
  

o Ability to thrive in a high-growth startup environment and adapt to evolving market needs.
  

o Highly collaborative, able to influence cross-functional teams and align business objectives.

  

**About Us**
------------

  

*Be part of something big. Fortescue is leading the world with our plan to decarbonise our iron ore operations, projects that harness renewable energy and the development of technology that will change our planet forever.*


**Our Commitment**
------------------

  

*Fortescue celebrates individual strengths and team members are encouraged to bring their whole selves to work. Our global workforce drives and promotes an inclusive culture, both within our organisation and throughout the communities we interact with. Diverse backgrounds include First Nations Peoples, people with disabilities, LGBTQ+ community, gender, neurodiverse, cultural diversity, all age groups, and those with an intersectional or multiple diverse characteristics.* ***We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.***

  

**https://fortescue.com/careers**

  

Internal Candidates / Current Contractors please apply via Success Factors Careers Portal. For further information on how to apply please visit the Fortescue Hub.

  

*Fortescue reserves the right to close applications early should a suitable pool of candidates be identified. Fortescue will never contact you to ask for payment of any kind, whether directly or through a third party.*

title: PCB Design Engineer
description:
Flex is the diversified manufacturing partner of choice that helps market-leading brands design, build and deliver innovative products that improve the world.


A career at Flex offers the opportunity to make a difference and invest in your growth in a respectful, inclusive, and collaborative environment. If you are excited about a role but don't meet every bullet point, we encourage you to apply and join us to create the extraordinary.

**Job Summary**
---------------


Flex Power Modules is looking for a passionate and experienced **PCB Design Engineer** to join our R&D team. In this role you will be at the forefront of developing next-generation power solutions for the Internet & Cloud infrastructure and AI – focusing on advanced DC/DC conversion and power electronics.


This is a unique opportunity for someone with deep technical knowledge in PCB Design for power electronics who wants to work hands-on with cutting-edge technologies and global hyper-scalers.


You will be part of our so-called support team, which takes on assignments from the four design teams that we currently have on site in Kalmar.


You will be introduced to the work by our senior PCB developer and will after that work in our so- called support team which takes on tasks from our four product design teams. We follow a SCRUM similar way of working with planning once a month and follow-ups a couple of times per week.


The PCB development work is an iterative process where the PCB designer works closely together with the team’s simulation engineers who will perform FEM simulations – both electronic and mechanical – on your design

**What a typical day looks like:**

* You will do PCB Design for new power module products.
* PCB Design of testboards.
* Update and evaluation of design rules.

**The experience we’re looking to add to our team:**

* B.Sc or M.Sc in electronics or relevant working experience.
* Experience from PCB- and electronic design.
* Fluent English.

**What you’ll receive for the great work you provide:**

* Knowledge within EMC, signal integrity and/or wave theory.
* A role at the forefront of technology in AI and data center infrastructure.
* A chance to influence product development from concept to launch.
* Knowledge in production technique of PCB.
* Knowledge in standards for PCB production.
* Experience of Cadence Allegro PCB Editor.


EB05

**Job Category**
----------------


Design, Process & Technology Engineering
Required Skills:


Optional Skills:


Flex is an Equal Opportunity Employer and employment selection decisions are based on merit, qualifications, and abilities. We do not discriminate based on: age, race, religion, color, sex, national origin, marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, disability, pregnancy status, or any other status protected by law. We're happy to provide reasonable accommodations to those with a disability for assistance in the application process. Please email accessibility@flex.com and we'll discuss your specific situation and next steps (NOTE: this email does not accept or consider resumes or applications. This is only for disability assistance. To be considered for a position at Flex, you must complete the application process first).

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Job Description** **WHAT YOU’LL DO:**

* Implement, test and maintain AI/ML solutions that ensure reliable, scalable, and high-quality production-grade deliveries.
* Contribute to the design and refinement of AI/ML features and services in collaboration with more experienced engineers.
* Participate in development activities such as code reviews, testing, and monitoring to ensure product quality, maintainability, and performance.
* Troubleshoot and resolve software, infrastructure, or data-related issues within existing AI/ML solutions.
* Collaborate with peers and stakeholders to clarify requirements and translate business needs into technical implementation tasks.
* Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives by suggesting enhancements to processes, tooling and engineering best practices.
* Stay updated on emerging AI/ML technologies, tools, and ways of working to continuously strengthen engineering capabilities.

**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**

You will be part of a cross-functional product team with other ML engineers, data scientists, data analysts and product manager, as well as collaborating with business stakeholders, solution architects and engineering manager(s) in order to build and enhance AI-powered solutions that drive innovation and efficiency across H&M.  



  

**WHO YOU ARE**

We are looking for people with…


* Strong Python programing skills and experience with tools, frameworks and technologies relevant to AI/ML development.
* Solid understanding of software engineering principles, testing methodologies, and best practices for building maintainable software solutions.
* Experience with cloud technologies and cloud-based AI/ML development, preferably on GCP and with Vertex AI.
* Thorough understanding of AI/ML algorithms, development lifecycle, MLOps practices and production-grade AI/ML solution development.
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to troubleshoot software, infrastructure, and data-related issues.
* Practical experience in working with version control systems such as Git and Agile development practices.


And people who have

* Strong collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work effectively across cross-functional teams and communicate technical topics to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Ability to contribute to requirement analysis and translate business needs into technical implementation tasks together with more experienced engineers.
* Ability to independently drive implementation work, while also understanding when to seek support, alignment or escalation when needed.
* Attention to quality, maintainability and engineering standards in delivered AI/ML solutions, with a mindset focused on continuous improvement.
* Proactive and curious mindset with passion for technology, innovation and continuously strengthening team efficiency, engineering culture and ways of working.

**WHO WE ARE**  

H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.


We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.


**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**  

We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.


In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.

**JOIN US**

Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.


Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.


*\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.*
company_description: At H&M, we welcome you to be yourself and challenge you to grow and make a difference. Help us reimagine the future of an entire industry, making everyone look, feel & do good.

title: Produktägare - Moderna arbetsplatsen
description:
**Om Samhall**


Är du också övertygad om att ett samhälle där alla får synas, bidra och ta plats också är ett rikare samhälle? I så fall kan Samhall vara rätt arbetsplats för dig. Vi arbetar dagligen med att bryta utanförskap, stärka självkänslan hos medarbetare och bidra till en mer inkluderande arbetsmarknad. Genom att utveckla sin arbetsförmåga i våra kunduppdrag kan personer med funktionsnedsättning öka sina möjligheter till arbete på den reguljära arbetsmarknaden och genom åren har över 200 000 personer inom vårt arbetsmarknadspolitiska uppdrag fått jobb inom och genom Samhall.


Ett arbete är så mycket mer än en försörjning, därför är Samhalls verksamhet så viktig både för individen och samhället i stort. Nu söker vi en Produktägare till teamet Moderna arbetsplatsen, en roll som också leder Samhalls AI-adoption, med placering på vårt kontor i Stockholm.


Kom och gör skillnad tillsammans med oss!

**Om rollen**


Du är produktägare för teamet Moderna arbetsplatsen, och du leder Samhalls arbete med att införa AI i hela organisationen.


Som produktägare ansvarar du för strategi, prioritering och leverans inom digital arbetsplats och Microsoft 365. Du äger produkterna genom hela livscykeln, från idé till förvaltning, med användarupplevelsen som ledstjärna. Du håller i sprintplanering och övriga ceremonier tillsammans med teamet.


Du driver Samhalls AI-råd, ett tvärfunktionellt organ som utvärderar och godkänner AI-verktyg utifrån juridiska, tekniska och verksamhetsmässiga perspektiv. Det är så vi inför AI på ett sätt som håller över tid med kontroll på var data hamnar, vilka verktyg som är godkända och vilken nytta de faktiskt ger. Under dig ligger en bred portfölj av initiativ, från verktyg för teknikutveckling och kalkylgranskning till styrdokumentsystem och omvärldsanalys.


Du höjer AI-kompetensen i hela organisationen. Du driver AI-stugan, ett återkommande öppet forum för erfarenhetsutbyte, och håller enhets- och distriktsdagar med hundratals deltagare. För de delar av organisationen som precis börjat lär du ut grundläggande promptning i M365 Copilot och stöttar bygget av Copilot-agenter. För de som kommit längre håller du workshops om att automatisera hela arbetsflöden, ofta med Claude Code och GitHub.


Du står för ett AI-first och markdown-first arbetssätt, där dokumentation och kunskapsbaser är maskinläsbara och går att navigera för agenter. Du följer upp resultatet med verktygens egen statistik och med enkäter till användarna, och du arbetar metodiskt för att minska skugg-AI.


Du rapporterar till chefen för produktägarfunktionen och arbetar nära processledare, tjänsteägare, agila coacher och utvecklingsteamen, men har även samarbeten långt utanför teknikorganisationen.

**Vår riktning**


Samhall STT genomgår en teknisk transformation där ökad rådighet, datadrivet arbetssätt och autonoma team är centrala ledstjärnor. Vi rör oss från SaaS-first mot ökad egenutveckling, cloud native och datacentrisk arkitektur, med AI som en naturlig del av hur vi bygger och levererar. Vi bygger långsiktig förmåga genom moderna arbetssätt, tydligt produktansvar och ett starkt fokus på kvalitet, effekt och kontinuerlig förbättring.

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**

* Äga strategi, prioritering och leverans för digital arbetsplats och Microsoft 365 genom hela produktlivscykeln
* Leda Samhalls AI-adoption och driva AI-rådet, som godkänner verktyg utifrån juridik, teknik och verksamhetsnytta
* Driva en bred portfölj av AI-initiativ, från verktyg för teknikutveckling och kalkylgranskning till styrdokument och omvärldsanalys
* Höja AI-kompetensen i hela organisationen genom AI-stugan, enhets- och distriktsdagar och annat utbildningsstöd
* Sprida ett AI-first och markdown-first arbetssätt, där dokumentation och kunskap är maskinläsbar och går att navigera för agenter
* Stötta team som precis börjat med promptning och Copilot-agenter, och team som kommit längre med att automatisera hela arbetsflöden i Claude Code och GitHub
* Följa upp adoption och nytta med verktygsstatistik och enkäter, och minska skugg-AI till förmån för godkända verktyg
* Hålla i sprintplanering och övriga agila ceremonier tillsammans med teamet

**Vi söker dig som har**

* Flerårig erfarenhet som produktägare, produktledare eller i en liknande roll inom digital utveckling
* Ett genuint och praktiskt intresse för AI och AI-agenter
* Erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 och digital arbetsplats som produkt och plattform
* Vana att arbeta hands-on med AI-verktyg som M365 Copilot, Copilot-agenter eller kodagenter som Claude Code
* Förmåga att leda och engagera människor, från enskilda team till stora utbildningsforum
* God förståelse för agila arbetssätt, backlogprioritering och nyttorealisering
* Förmåga att förena verksamhetsförståelse, teknikförståelse och användarperspektiv
* Högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet

**Personliga egenskaper**


Du är trygg i din kompetens och bygger förtroende genom att veta vad du talar om. Ditt intresse för AI är genuint, men du är lika upptagen av nyttan den ska skapa som av tekniken i sig.


Du gör det komplexa begripligt. Du är lika bekväm i en workshop med erfarna utvecklare som framför en sal med hundra medarbetare som precis tagit sina första steg med AI.


Du tar ansvar för helheten, från strategi och prioritering till det som faktiskt fungerar i användarnas vardag. Du driver förändring lugnt och metodiskt, och du leder genom tillit och kompetens snarare än genom mandat.

**Ansökan och övrig information**


Vill du bli en av oss? Varmt välkommen med din ansökan! På Samhall arbetar människor med många olika bakgrunder och erfarenheter, det tror vi gör oss till en mer kreativ och rolig arbetsplats. Därför söker vi alltid efter personer som på olika sätt kan bidra till att bredda våra perspektiv. Denna annons kommer ligga ute under semestern och återkoppling kommer ske i augusti.


Anställningsdatum: Enligt överenskommelse


Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning
  

Tjänstgöringsgrad: Heltid
  

Befattningens placering: Stockholm
  

Sista ansökningsdag: 31/7


Kontaktpersoner: David Barton, Chef Produktägare, david.barton@samhall.se

**Fackliga kontaktuppgifter:**  

Siwerth Ahlm Unionen, 070-546 87 17
  

Asim Zilic SACO, 070-359 45 15
  

Linda Hinderyd Ledarna, 072-204 49 67

title: Projektadministratör
description:
**Bli en del av ATICC Sweden – där teknik möter människor.**

*Trivs du i en roll där struktur möter komplexa projektmiljöer? Vi söker nu en självgående projektadministratör som vill vara med och bidra till att projektet drivs effektivt från start till mål. Skicka in din ansökan och låt oss skapa något stort tillsammans!*

**Om uppdraget**


Som projektadministratör har du en central roll i projektorganisationen och bidrar till struktur, ordning och framdrift i projektet. Du stöttar projektledning och produktion med koordinering av administrativa aktiviteter, hantering av projektdokumentation samt uppföljning av projektets processer. Genom ditt arbete säkerställer du att information, mötesstrukturer och administrativa flöden fungerar smidigt och effektivt under projektets olika faser.


Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer att bestå av:

* ansvara för projektets dokumenthantering, inklusive registrering, distribution och uppföljning av handlingar, ritningar och protokoll, samt säkerställa att gällande rutiner och krav följs.
* samordna möten, kallelser, dagordningar och mötesprotokoll.
* stödja rapportering av ekonomi, inköp och resursuppföljning.
* administrera ÄTA-arbeten, avvikelser och andra projektrelaterade ärenden.
* ge administrativt stöd till projektledning, produktionsledning och arbetsledning.

**Vem är du?**


Vi söker dig som är noggrann och självgående. Du tar ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och driver dem framåt på ett strukturerat sätt. Som person är du kommunikativ och trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor. Du har en god samarbetsförmåga och arbetar väl tillsammans med kollegor, konsulter och andra intressenter.


Vi ser också gärna att du har:

* tidigare erfarenhet av projektadministration inom bygg-, installations- eller industriprojekt.
* god administrativ förmåga och vana att hantera stora mängder dokumentation.
* erfarenhet av Microsoft Office 365, särskilt Excel, Word och Teams.
* mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.


Det är starkt meriterande om du har erfarenhet av verksamhetskritiska anläggningar såsom datacenter, sjukhus eller liknande miljöer. Även erfarenhet av dokumenthanteringssystem som Dalux, Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) eller SharePoint är en fördel. Kunskap om entreprenadprojekt enligt AB/ABT ses som meriterande. Det är även meriterande om du har arbetat med commissioning och driftsättning i projektens slutfaser.

**Därför ska du välja ATICC**


ATICC Sweden är en ledande teknikkonsult inom bygg-, anläggnings- och installationsbranschen. Hos oss står människan alltid i fokus. Vi tror att du presterar som bäst i en arbetsmiljö som är flexibel, rättvis och inspirerande. Därför bygger vi tillsammans en kultur där utveckling, delaktighet och inflytande är en naturlig del av vardagen.


Hos oss blir du en del av ett innovativt team som kombinerar teknisk spetskompetens med entreprenörsanda där vägen från idé till beslut är kort. Du blir en del av en gemenskap präglad av nyfikenhet, kreativt tänkande och engagemang. Vi tror på kraften i samarbeten för att skapa resultat som gör skillnad – både för företaget och för dig. Här får du möjlighet att arbeta i komplexa projekt och samtidigt utrymme att bidra till en innovativ och hållbar framtid.


Vi erbjuder frihet och flexibilitet, med en rättvis och attraktiv lönemodell. Tillsammans skapar vi ATICC Sweden som vi vill att det ska vara.

**Ytterligare information**


Tjänsten är ett konsultuppdrag på heltid under ett års tid med möjlighet till förlängning. Tillträde sker snarast.


Känner du igen dig i beskrivningen? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag! Urval och intervjuer kommer att ske löpande.


Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mejl, men du är mer än välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Ruqaya på ruqaya.abboud@aticc.se

*Välkommen att bli en del av vår resa – vi ser fram emot din ansökan!*

**Vi undanber oss vänligt men bestämt kontakt från bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt andra försäljare av ytterligare tjänster kopplade till våra rekryteringar.**

title: Produktionstekniker
description:
**Location:**

Ludvika, Dalarna County, Sweden
**Job ID:**

R0128202
**Date Posted:**

2026-05-21
**Company Name:**

HITACHI ENERGY SWEDEN AB
**Profession (Job Category):**

Engineering & Science
**Job Schedule:**

Full time
**Remote:**

No
**Job Description:**

**Career opportunities in Europe**

Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is committed to solving some of the biggest global challenges of our time by advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We are able to deliver on this great promise because we have great people who everyday work and innovate collaboratively across the globe.


As an employer, we operate in 90 countries with 50,000 people committed to ensuring they thrive and are empowered to deliver their best work as part of our Diversity 360 vision.


**The Opportunity**

At Hitachi Energy, we are driving the energy transition with digital innovation at the core of what we do. At our Surge Arresters unit in Ludvika, we are continuing our digital transformation journey and are now looking for a Software Engineer to join the team.


In this role, you will work close to both production and office teams, contributing to Industrial 4.0 initiatives in the factory while also helping improve internal processes through smart digital solutions. It is a hands-on role where you will get the opportunity to learn, experiment and grow within a supportive environment.


**How You’ll Make an Impact**

You will be involved in building and improving digital solutions across the unit. This includes both factory-related systems and tools supporting office processes.


* Developing and maintaining software solutions across backend and frontend
* Working with industrial systems such as SCADA, IoT platforms and cloud environments
* Connecting systems and machines using protocols like OPC UA and MQTT
* Supporting the team in identifying and implementing new digital opportunities
* Contributing to data-driven initiatives, including analytics and AI based use cases
* Documenting systems, configurations and ways of working to ensure long-term sustainability

**Your Background**

We are looking for someone who is eager to learn and grow within industrial digitalization.


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering or a similar field
* Experience within software development, industrial IT, automation or IoT
* Knowledge in one or more programming languages such as Python, C# or Java
* Experience working with databases and solid understanding of SQL
* Basic understanding of cloud platforms, preferably Azure, and on-prem environments
* An interest in industrial systems and how software can improve production and operations
* A strong interest in modern AI and data-driven solutions, with a curiosity to explore how new technologies can be applied in an industrial environment

Most importantly, you are curious, proactive and enjoy working in a collaborative environment where you can make a real impact!


**What We Offer**

* Collective agreement
* Flexible working time
* Health care and wellness allowance
* Fantastic career possibilities within Hitachi Energy—both within Sweden and internationally
* A dedicated mentor to support you throughout your onboarding phase
* Various trainings and educational opportunities to support your development
* A diverse and inclusive workplace with over 70 nationalities represented in Sweden
* Supplementary compensation for parental leave
* Access to our Employee Benefit Portal with thousands of discounts and perks

**More About Us**

Are you ready for a new exciting challenge? Does the above description sound like you? Welcome to apply!  



  

Applications will be reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don’t delay – apply today!


Union representatives - Sveriges Ingenjörer: Marcus Nordlund-Oja, +46 107-38 31 93; Ledarna: Frank Hollstedt, + 46 107-38 70 43; Unionen: Per Lidman, +46 73 0500 603.


**Qualified individuals with a disability may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Hitachi Energy career site as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by completing a** **general inquiry form** **on our website. Please include your contact information and specific details about your required accommodation to support you during the job application process.**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is solely for job seekers with disabilities requiring accessibility assistance or an accommodation in the job application process. Messages left for other purposes will not receive a response.**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Senior AI Cloud Architect Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**Senior AI Cloud Architect (AI Platform)- Public 360°- Tieto Indtech (m/f/d)**
*Tietoevry Public 360 - building secure, scalable digital services for the public sector across the Nordics.*
**About The Role**
 Public 360 integrates cloud-based AI capabilities into standard enterprise software. We are building solutions for 600+ public organizations in the Nordics, and our AI platform runs customer deployments at scale and is evolving fast with GenAI and agentic AI.
   

  

 As Senior AI Cloud Architect, you own the cloud architecture for our AI platform and shared services. You will define reference architectures, make key technology choices (Microsoft-first, but open), and ensure security, reliability, and automation as we scale.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Design and evolve the target architecture for a public-cloud-first AI platform (Azure preferred).
* Exploration of alternative deployment strategies for high-security customers
* Build secure, compliant foundations: landing zones, identity, networking, encryption, secrets, logging, and policy-as-code.
* Architect for scale and automation: infrastructure as code, CI/CD, GitOps, self-service environments, and operational runbooks.
* Own platform reliability: observability, SLOs, incident patterns, performance, and cost optimization (FinOps).
* Define patterns for AI product integration: APIs, event-driven processing, data pipelines, and multi-tenant considerations.
* Partner with AI engineers/data scientists on MLOps and LLMOps: model delivery pipelines, feature stores, evaluation, and monitoring.
* Drive security and Trustworthy AI practices together with security, privacy, and product teams (GDPR and data residency aware).
* Support solutioning and pre-sales when needed, and mentor architects/engineers across product teams.


**What You Bring**
* Senior – 8-10+ years of relevant experience, including service or solution architecture in complex product environments. More junior profiles will be considered in case of relevant experience – not the time but the type of experience and responsibility is important to us.
* Strong public cloud architecture skills (Azure: AKS/Container Apps, Functions, App Service, API Management, Event Hubs/Service Bus, Storage, SQL/Cosmos DB, Key Vault, Entra ID).
* Experience with multiple deployment scenarios and high security requirements is a plus
* Hands-on experience with automation: Terraform and/or Bicep, CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), and modern deployment practices.
* Proven security architecture skills: threat modeling, zero trust, network segmentation, secrets management, vulnerability management, and audit readiness.
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms: Azure ML/MLflow, model serving, data pipelines, and LLM integration patterns.
* Ability to translate business needs into pragmatic architectures and communicate clearly with both engineers and stakeholders.


**Nice to have**
* Experience with GenAI platforms (e.g., Azure OpenAI) and guardrails: content filters, prompt injection defense, red teaming, and evaluation.
* Knowledge of data engineering components: Databricks/Spark, Delta Lake, data streaming, and search/vector databases.
* Certifications such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure Security Engineer, or similar.


**Impact you will have**
* Own the reference architecture for our cloud-first AI platform supporting AI capabilities for public organizations in the Nordics.
* Raise the security and compliance baseline with zero-trust patterns, policy-as-code, and audit-ready controls.
* Increase delivery speed and consistency through automation: self-service environments.
* Improve reliability and cost efficiency with SLO-driven operations, observability, and FinOps practices.


**Tech we use**
 Azure-first and automation-driven: containers/Kubernetes, serverless, messaging, IaC (Terraform/Bicep), CI/CD (Azure DevOps/GitHub), observability, and cloud security tooling. We are open to AWS/GCP experience.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like In 6 Months**
* A clear platform roadmap indicating the next steps for our data and ai platform as baseline for our product teams, supporting our vision of AI-first and agentic-first software offerings in the public sector domain.
* Review and implementation of defined improvements of automation framework and pipelines in place for core platform services.
* Operational excellence established: dashboards, SLOs, alerting, and incident playbooks used in day-to-day operations.
* Security and Trustworthy AI governance embedded: threat models, risk assessments, and guardrail patterns for GenAI use cases.


**Why join us**
* Build technology that improves citizen services - with real-world scale and meaningful impact.
* A highly skilled, collaborative environment with room to influence architecture decisions end-to-end.
* Modern cloud-first stack, strong focus on security and responsible AI, and freedom to explore new approaches (including agentic AI).
* Professional growth, international collaboration, and a culture built on trust, transparency, and ownership.


**Practicalities**
 Location and work setup: flexible/hybrid, ideally near one of our development hubs in Scandinavia (Oslo, Stockholm, Copenhagen or Espoo). Fluent English required; Nordic language skills are a plus.
   

  

**Are you our new colleague?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Geir Are Bjørnsrud (geirare.bjornsrud@tietoevry.com)
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)
